title: Alphabet & Spelling
description: Master the English alphabet and learn to spell your name and basic words.
summary_pt_br: O alfabeto inglês tem 26 letras. Soletrar em inglês é essencial para dar nomes, endereços e números de telefone.

exercises.question: Which letter sounds like 'jay'?
exercises.explanation: The letter J is pronounced /dʒeɪ/ — like 'jay'.
exercises.hint_pt_br: J em inglês soa parecido com 'djei'.

exercises.question: Which letter sounds like 'double-you'?
exercises.explanation: The letter W is literally called 'double U' /ˈdʌb.əl juː/.
exercises.hint_pt_br: W literalmente significa 'U duplo' em inglês.

exercises.explanation: The five vowels and their names in English. Memorize these first — they appear in every spelling.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Os cinco sons das vogais em inglês — diferentes do português.

exercises.question: To spell 'HELLO': aitch, E, double ___, O.
exercises.explanation: 'Double L' is how we read two of the same letter in a row.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Em inglês, duas letras iguais seguidas são lidas como 'double'.

exercises.question: Someone says 'How do you spell your name?' They want to know…
exercises.explanation: 'Spell' means to say the letters one by one — 'M-A-R-I-A'.

exercises.question: Complete the order: A, B, C, D, E, F, ___, H
exercises.explanation: G comes between F and H.
exercises.hint_pt_br: G vem entre F e H.

exercises.explanation: These four letters trip up Portuguese speakers the most. Practice them out loud.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Essas quatro letras são as que mais confundem brasileiros.

exercises.question: How is 'COFFEE' spelled out loud?
exercises.explanation: Native speakers often shortcut 'FF' as 'double F'. Both are understood.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Ambas as formas funcionam — 'double F / double E' é natural e comum.
